entry.title: Re: Derive Week Range based on Date (SAC Model)
entry.content: Hi Venkat, I tried this in new model, it did work but when I upload new data from flat file. For all the new tranformations it is asking for source column to map Please suggest how to move ahead here, Its not allowing to load the data

entry.title: Re: CAP authentication
entry.content:
Technically speaking, CAP typically relies on approuter/xsuaa instances to oversee authentication. That's maybe most common but that's not an absolute. 

Assuming that your CAP application deployment is front-ended by approuter, you should have a look at this post by Marius Obert,  I haven't used this in a while, but I expect the mechanism still works. Marius writes up an important caveat on the technique -- it will not work universally -- so read carefully.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel and SAP Datasphere connection
entry.content:
Hi @alexander_peter,

Thanks for the heads up regarding #SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel.

Is there any other official announcements and documentation for this info?

Do you mean now if customers connect SAP Datasphere tenant directly with SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel then it requires the BI subscription for the end user though it's included SAC license already?  It's little bit confusing between Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud.

Appreciate more clarification.

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: SAP Zertifizierung - Updates 2024
entry.content:
Vielen Dank fürs Teilen, Thomas!
Mit Stay Certified können u. a. Trends für 2024 wie generative künstliche Intelligenz, Cloud ERP oder Clean Core vermittelt und überprüft werden.

entry.title: Revision level on products- different per plant ?
entry.content:
We have a need to have different revision levels for a product on plant level. How can we do that?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Revision level on products- different per plant ?
entry.content:
The revision level for a product is it not available at plant level . 

 

Please follow the KBA 2963059 ( https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2963059 ) and submit a feature request if you would like it added

entry.title: Is it possible to change the Comm. User ID?
entry.content:
Hi SAP support team,

Is it possible to rechange the CC ID in "Maintain communication user"?

 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to change the Comm. User ID?
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

 

The Communication User ID is created automatically by the system and it's not modifiable.

The same happens for Business Users ID, for example, this information is unique for each user and cannot be edited.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: how to do GI in the Q stock from the upper lever WBS...
entry.content:
You need to transfer the material from one WBS stock segment to another with a 415Q movement type.

It's a transfer posting in MIGO.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere and SAP Data Intelligence Cloud - what does this mean for me now?
entry.content: The blog contains links to the official SAP Notes regarding end of life for DI Cloud and DI on-prem. Regarding new capabilities, the roadmap explorer, also linked in the blog is the official source for any coming plans. There are a lot of capabilities coming to the solution over the coming quarters so please continue to monitor the roadmap over this time.

entry.title: WebIDE After building, code changes revert
entry.content:
I'm facing a strange issue where I'm making a small change to my Component.js file, but once I build the code is reverted back to what it was before. I've never seen this before so I've tried logging in/out, opening webIDE in incognito and clearing cache to no avail. 

Can anyone please help me on this? The code keeps reverting right after the build is completed, even when attempting to deploy.

entry.title: Select query date feild in not working
entry.content: I given greater than equal to condition in select query but still its fetching old records

entry.title: Re: Function Module for converting lower case to upper case
entry.content: thank you

entry.title: Re: Send SAPscript form PDF from output type message to Business Network
entry.content:
We are running into an issue with this BADI logic above.  We are finding that the NAST record has not been created at the point of this BADI executing.  Does anybody know what we may have done incorrectly?

Much appreciated...

entry.title: Re: WebIDE After building, code changes revert
entry.content: I found the solution. I copied the code, deleted the file I was trying to change, made a new file with the same name and put the code back in. After this, the build completed without reverting my code.

entry.title: ECTR Macro PARAMETER_MAP search for Empty
entry.content:
Hi,

is it possible to search for an empty / not filled value in a class in ECTR macro?

My idea was: 

p_classification = PARAMETER_MAP("Class1@Classtype1")
p_classification.CONFIGURATION_TYPE = ""

search1 = SEARCH("doc", p, p_classification)
resultlist1 = KEYLIST_FROM_SET(search1)


But I get all documents back and not only the ones without an entry.

I hope someone allready had this problem and can help.

entry.title: Re: Message_Type_X error when using BAPI
entry.content: There is a message sent along with the MESSAGE_TYPE_X. Check the SAP notes or contact SAP support.

entry.title: SAP IAS - Password Synchronisation with Active Directory
entry.content:
Hello all,
Is it possible to sync passwords between IAS and Active Directory? 
I have a scenario under which users can authenticate using the SPNEGO mechanism: however, in case the kerberos token is not available, they should be able to log-in via Username and Password, using the same password that they use to authenticate via AD.

I was not able to find anything in the documentation that reflects a similar scenario.

Any hint?
Best,
Roberto.

entry.title: Re: SAC Measure input control doesn't work
entry.content:
@ypinchuk 

If you go with measure based filter you might not able to plan in the table. Instead of measure based filter, try creating a measure based dimension using the measure values to create dimension category. Make sure you cover all possible values for the measure including null. Then you can use this dimension to filter the table.

Nikhil

entry.title: Please share the list of Business Processes in SAP PP.
entry.content: Please share the list of Business Processes in SAP PP.

entry.title: Re: Transformation issue in SAC Data Model
entry.content:
@bosingh 

Not sure what was the workflow used. But once you created the the transformation and the job, you should just edit the job and replace data source and select the new file, your transformation should remain intact.

Nikhil

Hi Rajesh,

The PAN number is not currently available in the OData API for BP, you could use the.  If you would like to suggest this an a feature request on the SAP Customer influence portal please follow the steps in KBA 2838330 - How To Request for New Features for Master Data topics in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. 

Kind Regards,
Stephen

entry.title: Re: SAC Measure input control doesn't work
entry.content: Nikhil, it's analytic table, not planning. I created a measure based dimension but it doesn't work with unbooked date members

entry.title: Re: Badi hitting twice...SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_C for Dispute Management ECC 6.0
entry.content:
I was having the same issue.

  1. BADI Implementation UDM_BEFORE_VALID_S of Definition SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_S is calling the customer implementation of Definition SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_C.  Refer to class method IF_EX_SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_S~CHANGE to see that call.
  2. The customer implementation of SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_C is then called directly on its own as you would expect.

That is how my system works for Package UDM_CASE in Software Component FSCM_CCD Release 618 SP14.

entry.title: Re: How to use aggregated value of a Z Condition Type aut...
entry.content:
Hi Abul,

Do you want to have a field amount (kbetr/ConditionRateRatio) for ZPM0 as not zero in the order? If I can see it correctly, you are already using an own Custom Logic implementation. Try to use a statement like ConditionRateValue = ConditionAmount in this implementation.

Thank you.

Kind Regards,
Iza

entry.title: Re: CAP authentication
entry.content:
In most of cases all deployed applications to SAP BTP is behind authorization. By default public access is restricted.  There are some work around if you really want to do it without authorization

Anyway could you specify the Postman method? Are you trying to reach local one or the deployed version of service/application router? If it is local I think you can try to use .http file to test your requests. you can set authorization with {{me}} Example

If you are trying to reach a deployed app/service on SAP BTP you will need to create a service key and authenticate by using OAuth 2.0. After creating the service key on SAP BTP cockpit you can read this documentation and get your Bearer token  https://learning.postman.com/docs/sending-requests/authorization/oauth-20/

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content: Hi @julieplummer20 , thanks for sharing the great news! Kindly consider posting such news with an ABAP related tag like https://community.sap.com/t5/c-khhcw49343/ABAP+Development/pd-p/833755570260738661924709785639136. I actually missed this totally on SCN and only learned of it from social network 🙂

entry.title: SAP Support for suppliers on Ariba
entry.content: Hi! I'd like to know how can suppliers on Ariba request support from SAP. Is there any steps I can follow?

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: 95b37bbfb78cfe8359129bada7e2668b625984bec104a8cbfc372d79b7289163

entry.title: Re: SAP Support for suppliers on Ariba
entry.content:
Hi Ruisa! Thanks for sharing your question. As a supplier on Ariba, the companies can request assistance over the phone or e-mail.  They just need to follow the steps described below.

  • Access supplier.ariba.com
  • Click on the “?” icon, at the top right corner
  • Select “Support”
  • Select “Contact us”
  • Select “Register on SAP Business Network”
  • Select “Something else”
  • Select any of the options
  • Select “Create a Case”
  • Fill the form to request assistance by phone or email.

You can also check the steps described above on the blog post with screenshots or YouTube video Supplier Launchpad: Introducing the New Help Centre - YouTube.

If you need any further guidance, the Customer Interaction Center is also available 24/7 to guide customers through this process. You can find their contact information according to your country here: SAP Support Worldwide Telephone Directory.

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2023
entry.content:

We have employees in WV in Hardy county and this county is not added in the table T5UTZ. As per the new regulations, we need to display County in the quarterly files. Not sure if BSI is planning to add the county or not. Any suggestions to handle this situation would be appreciated.

entry.title: Systemcopy sap QAS longTime
entry.content: Hello everyone, I'm performing the homogeneous system copy of my SAP QAS SQL Server 2019 on Windows Server 2019 using SAPINS. I exported it, and it took approximately 72 hours. Now I'm in the process of importing it to another server, and it has been 6 days, but it hasn't finished yet. Is there anything in this process that can be done faster?

entry.title: Is it possible to restrict which Business Role is assignable to a Business User?
entry.content:
Hello Dear SAP,

 

With the administrator role I can assign business roles to the business users. For all business users to all business roles.

I would like to create a subadmin business role. For example a Purchaser Administrator. The Purchaser administrator can only assign the business roles that are related to purchasing. Is that even possible? How would I handle this?

I decided to restrict a copied version of the administrator role to achiev this. I restricted the businessroles with a assigned bussines group. Therefore in the value help it should only display the purchase business roles(according to the bussines group). But the restriction simply doesnt work! it doesnt has any effect of restriction. This seems like a software bug to me.

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Scheduled Report shows successful status; but Mail server never Receives... Where's the problem?
entry.content:
System Overview:

Using SAP Business Objects 4.3 SP3

We recently switched to using a mail forwarding service SendGrid which has a 20mg limit on SMTP emails.  For the most part this has worked fine but there are a few schedules which have reports generated greater than 20mg in size.  Such schedules are failing to make it to their recipient; yet the schedule shows success.  It appears this is a hard limit within SendGrid that we can't configure.  I wouldn't mind but I would have expected the BO schedule to report failed; instead the schedule returns success!  Why?

I found KBA 1778797 Email recipient does not receive report but the instance status is "Success"

This KBA indicates because the relay/mail server "accepted responsibility for delivery of the message" BOBJ's responsibility has ended; thus job status is success. 

 

However, SendGrid testing using telnet shows it's not accepting responsibility.  it immediately returns an error:  "Mailbox unavailable.  The server response was: error reading data, max message size exceeded."  

I'm confident there's a gap here I'm missing but I'm not technical enough to see it. 

Could it be that SendGrid receives the email message.  sends an Acknowledgement back to BOBJ which BOBJ interprets as "I got it" and BOBJ moves on?  But then SendGrid does a process sees it violates rules and sends a message back which BOBJ ignores? 

To prove this out I created two reports one which is under 20mg (barely) one over 20mg (23).  These reports run daily.  I always receive the one less than 20mg.  The 23mg one has yet to get to me.  Both show status "Success"

When I use telnet to connect to the mail relay and generate a message to send, it returns an error message indicating the message is not accepted by the Mail server because it's too big.  I don't get any other acknowledgement..  So to me there's only one message from SendGrid... I reject your mail... so why does BOBJ show success? 

Does KBA 1778797 apply here? Do I need to open a ticket with SAP for investigation or is this a influence request to better handle errors/warnings from the mail servers when sending messages?   This appears to be a GAP in the process of handling email destinations I wasn't expecting to encounter.

Note: I have no access to our Server logs (they are administrated by a 3rd party) I have no access to mail server or relay (they are administrated by a different group).

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to restrict which Business Role is **bleep**...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

 

Unfortunately, it's not possible to restrict which Business Roles an user is authorized to assign to others. 

If the user has authorization to assign Business Users to Business Roles, he will be able to assign all the Business Roles available... 

 

However, I have tried to find any alternative to provide to you and there's a functionality that might be something similar.

This functionality is the Maintain Business User Groups and Maintain Businsess Role Groups.

With Maintain Business User Groups app you can create business user groups and assign multiple business users to them. This helps you to organize your area and easily search for all business users of a certain category (for example to assign them to business roles). Grouping also facilitates maintenance of authorizations. If you are the super administrator for all areas, you can delegate this task to administrators for the relevant areas, such as Financials. In this case, you would create a business user group for Financials.

With Maintain Business Roles Groups app you can create business role groups and assign multiple business roles to them. This helps you to organize your area and easily search for all business roles of a certain category (for example to assign business users to them). Grouping also facilitates maintenance of authorizations. If you are the super administrator for all areas, you can delegate this task to administrators for the relevant areas, such as Financials. In this case, you would create a business role group for Financials and allow to assign these business roles only to particular user groups. 

 

For more information, you can check the following documentations:

SAP Blog Post | How to use the Maintain Business User Groups functionality

SAP Blog Post | How to use the Maintain Business Role Groups functionality

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Fiori App F1564
entry.content: Hi Dominik, sorry but both links are working for me, I tried different browsers. They work. Please share the screenshot of what you see. But basically you can simply search yourself on the help portal for "Attachments of Bank Statements"

entry.title: Re: M-series Apple Chip MacBooks and Abap Platform Trial containers using Docker and Podman
entry.content:
Good evening Dylan @dylan-drummond  

Thx for your investigation and tests. Meanwhile I can confirm, that the new 2022 image is also running with utm/ubuntu and docker. I've the feeling that Podman is a bit faster, but never mind. 

Also there is an interesting thread on docker rosetta support, which is quite specific about the issues regarding Rosetta2. Anyway maybe it is worth trying a test with docker native and qemu in the current version. https://github.com/docker/roadmap/issues/384

Will give an update. Bests Tom

entry.title: Re: How to use aggregated value of a Z Condition Type aut...
entry.content:
Hi Iza,

Do you want to have a field amount (kbetr/ConditionRateRatio) for ZPM0 as not zero in the order?

I would say that not for all sales order. Statement is true only for when ZPR1 value found in the header. ZPR1 value will found for promotional sales order. 

Thanks 
Abul Hasnat

entry.title: Role Lists in "latest Role-Based Permissions"
entry.content:
Hi - With the "latest Role-Based Permissions" screen, we are no longer able to navigate to see the roles.  You can only see what's on page 1 or do a search.  In the legacy role-based permissions screen we would see "items per page" and an arrow allowing us to go to the next page.

Was the removal of the "Next Page" intentional?

Thanks,

Rich

entry.title: Display All Steps in Role Assignments
entry.content:
As per PLU-8126 "Display All Steps in Role Assignments", I should have the ability to maintain the role by "scrolling down, clicking Next, or choosing the steps in the anchor bar".  However I only have the ability to choose the next step in the anchor bar.  The note says it should be working by default, but it is not.

Thanks,

Rich

entry.title: Re: Problem with Drag and Drop in Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi,

When you record a drag and drop in Producer, it creates a message bubble that explains what must be dragged and where it should be dropped.  Is that message bubble appearing?  Can you modify the instructions in that message bubble to make it clear what the user is to do?

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Bring your own Git for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello @ivanrodrigo / @christoph_pohl ,

I have created an SAP incident asking for where SAP is expecting to store credentials and I received below response. Looks like its another certificate expiration issue with Github Root, which will be patched in 2405 in Mid-May. As of now, SAP consultant has installed the certificate in our system & I'm able to successfully clone GitHub. 

SAP Response

"Unfortunately the issue became recently known to us and it is caused by an expired Github Root certificate that needs to be installed in the correct folder. We have taken note of this problem and it will be automatically fixed starting with the release of 2405 in mid-May. I have installed the certificate in your system, could you please try the clone again and let me know if it worked?"

entry.title: Re: Lowest SAP ECC version that can be integrated with SA...

entry.title: Analysis for Office - Lost Functionality - View Query Documents? RSA1 -> Documents
entry.content:
Did we lose functionality with BW 7.5 SP28? 

Documents created in BW (RSA1 -> Documents) are no longer attached or viewable in the Query Designer (View -> Documents) nor can they found in the query definition in BWMT (BW Modeling Tool).

In a perfect world, in Analysis for Office Excel, a user could go to Analysis Design -> Lauch Query Designer -> Bex Query Designer -> View Documents and then see the document. Or Analysis Design -> Lauch Query Designer -> BW Modeling Tools -> ?????? As it stands now, I can't find a place In Query Designer OR BW Modeling tools where I can see the Documents created in RSA1 -> Documents.

Thanks for your help,

John Hawk

entry.title: Migration Cockpit Error (Condition record for pricing in sales)
entry.content:
When I try to migrate the following data with the Migration Cockpit app, the following error message appears and I cannot migrate the data.
(object: Condition record for pricing in sales (restricted) )<data>
3,480.000 JPY / 100 PCE<error message>
Converting the file payload from string-format to ABAP-types failed
　(Message Class: DMC_MD_INTERPRETER, Message Number: 5)
Data sheet 'Pricing Condition Records' (row x): converting the field 'Amount' to an ABAP-type failed
　(Message Class: DMC_MD_INTERPRETER, Message Number: 9)
Value 3479.9999999999995 cannot be converted; value can have maximum 3 decimal places
　(Message Class: DMC_MD_INTERPRETER, Message Number: 35)How can I solve this problem?
Please help.

entry.title: Re: Role Lists in "latest Role-Based Permissions"
entry.content: Hi Rich, I've just checked in our Preview environment and all the roles appear on one continuous page, and scrolling down progressively loads more and more roles until it gets to the end (rather than spread across 6 pages in the legacy version).

entry.title: Re: How to configure employee search result in global header
entry.content:
If you use Employee Central, you can enable General Display Name via Company System & Logo Settings, and then in Manage Data > Name Format, you can set the format of the General Display Name which is used across the system, including the search results when searching for employees in the global header. 

For example, if you have a Preferred Name field in Employee Central, you can set it so that the format is Preferred First Name + Last Name, with an alternative of the regular First Name field so that the regular first name is used it the Preferred First Name is not maintained. 

If this is what your question is regarding, then you should be able to find plenty of information from SAP using the search term 'General Display Name'.

Edit: I've just seen that, even without General Display Name enabled, there is another setting on Company System & Logo Settings "Enable the name format selected in Configure People Profile to apply globally". Then within Configure People Profile > General Settings, there is the option Choose Name Format where you can select the relevant format from Manage Data > Name Format.

entry.title: Re: #COE #BA01 Exempt Billing Line Item Scenarios in Brazil
entry.content: Hi Dave - Thanks for the reply, we're already aware of that Brazil documentation, it doesn't address the scenarios listed above.

entry.title: Cross Domain Proxlet Download pack 1H 2024
entry.content:
Hi 

The What's New Viewer Includes the update of the Cross Domain Proxlet which must be carried out by customers on their side who are using a Cross Domain Proxlet. 

When will the download be available? I followed the link in the what's new viewer however the only Cross Domain Proxlet download was from 2H 2023. 

Want to make sure I have the correct download to hand over to my IT Team.

entry.title: Unschedule a CRM Action
entry.content:
I have an action with a schedule condition and a start condition.

I want to schedule it when my object has a specific status.

Then I want to start it on a specific date.

If the status changes before that specific date, I want to delete that scheduled action and not trigger it when the date comes.

How can I do that?

entry.title: Unschedule a CRM Action
entry.content:
I have an action with a schedule condition and a start condition.

I want to schedule it when my object has a specific status.

Then I want to start it on a specific date.

If the status changes before that specific date, I want to delete that scheduled action and not trigger it when the date comes.

How can I do that?

entry.title: Re: iOS build fails
entry.content:
Respectfully, I don't fully understand your question, whether you mean adding a password to an existing certificate, which I don't how or if even possible, or you would like to create a new certificate with a password, in which case the following should be helpful (as suggested by old AppGyver's IOS builds - Build - Distribute😞

  • IOS builds - SAP Help Portal
  • How to make a p12 file for iOS_ 2020 Update - Calvium (password setting is here)
  • How to make a mobileprovision file - Calvium
  • Certificates, Identifiers & Profiles - Apple Developer

Hope this helps…

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Add In - Multiple Tables
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is it possible to have 3 different tables from each Model combined into 1 Sheet. I have Planning Cost Object Models of Cost Center, WBS & Real Estate. I need to create a report which combines all 3 Cost Objects. I can create 3 Sheets but can I make the tables dynamic so that there is no overlap? 

For example 1 table gives me 100 rows and 2nd table I create start from 101. But it should be dynamic as no of rows will keep on changing.

entry.title: Re: Is there ServiceLayer for Blob object
entry.content: Thanks for confirming Ankit!

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track São Paulo
What table is utilized to save Subscription Contract status?
entry.content: Some subscription contracts are in "Technically Inactive" status. Using the "Manage Subnscription Contracts" in SAP BRIM Fiori and looking for a specific contract I can see the field "Technically Active" with No as value. They made me to look why those subscription contracts are in such status but no luck. Any clue where I can set a breakpoint and investigate further? Actually if I knew the name of the table for Subscription contracts or their statuses could be of great help. Thank you

Event name - SAP BUILD code jam

entry.title: First Half 2024 Release: What’s New in SAP SuccessFactors HCM
entry.content:
With new AI capabilities in recruiting, performance & goals, core HR, and more PLUS new people profile experiences, timesheet integration with SAP S/4HANA, enhanced experiences for onboarding and benefits, and more self-service tasks via Microsoft Teams – the 1H 2024 release is delivering 250+ innovative features and enhancements! 

As we go into preview on April 19 and production on May 17, I'm excited to share the following SAP SuccessFactors HCM highlights – aligned to our four key areas of innovation and designed to help you make every employee a success story. Here's to another great release! 

Deliver an elevated experience

AI: New capabilities for employees, managers, recruiters, and HR teams
With 25+ new AI capabilities spanning across the suite, there’s something for everyone in this release. For employees – new Joule capabilities (view my pay statement, clock in/clock out, and more), AI-assisted performance and development goal creation, and AI-assisted writing (for goals, feedback, assignments, etc.). For managers – new Joule capabilities (create a spot award, create a position, and more) and AI-assisted person insights for a quick view into an employee’s compensation and job history. For recruiters – AI-assisted applicant screening and AI-assisted skills matching. And for HR teams – the ability to serve up HR policy information and documents hosted on SharePoint via a quick employee conversation with Joule.

Create a spot award

Work tech: Now available in Microsoft Teams App Store, employee quick actions
SAP SuccessFactors is now available on the Microsoft Teams App Store, making it easier than ever to provide this convenience to your employees and managers. And adding to the existing capabilities already available, employees can now access quick actions directly from Microsoft Teams for requesting or giving feedback, managing their personal details, and more.  Quick actions in Microsoft Teams

 

 

 

 

 

Mobile: People profile views, org chart, global benefits, learning, and more
Several of the latest innovations across the suite are also available on the SAP SuccessFactors mobile app. For the people profile, the new profile preview and spotlight view are available, as well as the new org chart experience, making it easy to stay connected while on the go. For the recently launched integrated learning experience, employees can access new enhancements via the mobile app, including self-driven learning activities, reviewing details for required learning, and having a single view of pending learning tasks. We’re also pleased to share that the offline learning capability is now available on Android devices, allowing course progress and completion to be automatically updated when a mobile device is back online.

Spotlight view, Org chart, Learning on mobile

System admin: Improvements to the Configuration Transport Center
Significant improvements to the Configuration Transport Center have been made by adding nearly every setting for configuring SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central. These new capabilities enable system administrators to easily transport configurations for Employee Central from development and test tenants to their production tenant. An improved search function lets them quickly find specific configurations, and with the new audit reports, they can track configuration changes and automate change management.

Configuration Transport Center

Build a future-ready workforce

SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting: AI-assisted applicant screening and AI-assisted skills matching
With this release, we’re excited to bring more AI capabilities to the recruiter experience. Now applicants can provide skills as part of the application process on the career site by uploading a resume, searching and adding skills, or using the suggest skills functionality. Skills are extracted from the resume and within the applicant workbench, recruiters can see a skills compatibility for each applicant based on matching the applicant’s skills to the job requisition. This helps improve applicant screening and shortens time to hire by giving recruiters a quick and accurate view into the matching, missing, and potential skills for every applicant.

AI-assisted skills matching

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding: Enhanced new hire experience, mass completion option
With the enhanced new hire experience, onboardees can view and complete all outstanding onboarding tasks from a single page, including data collection, compliance tasks, and exploring the onboarding guide. For orgs with high-volume hiring, a new mass completion option makes it possible for hiring managers to complete tasks for multiple new hires (up to 100) at the same time, such as requesting equipment or setting goals.

 New hire onboarding experience

SAP SuccessFactors Opportunity Marketplace: AI-driven recommendations for Ignite Your Role, Reach Your Aspirations, and internal jobs
We’re providing more personalized recommendations with new two categories – Ignite Your Role recommends opportunities to help employees grow in their current job role, while Reach Your Aspirations recommends opportunities based on an employees interested skills, target roles, or development goals. Also, based on an employee’s growth portfolio, AI driven recommendations for internal jobs from SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting are now available.

  New recommendation categories

SAP SuccessFactors Learning: Enhancements to new learner experience, custom cards and banners, bulk merger tool
Continuing with the integrated learning experience we released last year, we’re delivering additional features to support a variety of learner interactions and preferences. These include optional assignments, a refreshed learning history page, and additional filtering options to help employees find specific language or region-specific courses. For admins, new custom cards (up to eight) and a configurable banner provide the opportunity to promote specific content on the learner home page – with a brand-new admin page to easily create and manage these new options. Also for admins, a new bulk merge capability can bring together multiple user accounts, either from different employments or from the conversion of an external to internal user in SAP SuccessFactors Learning.

Important Learning including optional assignments

SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals: AI-assisted performance goal creation, AI-assisted writing
With this release, employees can use AI to quickly create performance goals. After entering a brief description of what they want to achieve, employees receive ready-made goals with the option to accept, discard, or regenerate as needed. Additionally, we're introducing AI-assisted writing across a variety of performance and goal-related interactions for both employees and managers, including enhancing the quality and tone of performance goals and making feedback more actionable.AI-assisted performance goal creation

Enable agile and compliant HR

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central: Profile preview and spotlight view of people profile, new org chart experience, new quick actions (+ Joule and MS Teams), new ‘My Team Positions’ experience
We’re excited to provide two new people profile experiences – with the profile preview giving a quick snapshot of key areas of the employee profile and the spotlight view allowing employees to build and represent their personal brand by showcasing skills and competencies, mentoring and target roles, and other relevant information sourced from SAP SuccessFactors solutions. We’re also introducing a new org chart experience with a refreshed look and feel where employees can easily explore their org structure and navigate to the new people profile experiences.

Spotlight view of people profile

To provide more self-service options, we’re providing new quick actions available on the home page, Joule, and Microsoft Teams. And for managers, a new My Team Positions provides a tile-based view where positions can be viewed, edited, and created – all directly from the home page.

My Team Positions experience

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central – Global Benefits: New enrollment experience for insurance, savings plan, and pension benefits
Available on both desktop and our mobile app, the new benefits enrollment experience gives employees an easy way to navigate their benefit elections with side-by-side plan comparisons, embedded instructional text, and the option to update dependent information and manage beneficiaries. To support this new experience and specific org needs, we’re providing a new flexible framework for benefits admins that includes capturing life insurance guaranteed issue amounts, customizable terms and conditions, and enhanced localization capabilities.

Benefits enrollment experience

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking: New monthly calendar view, new timesheet approval center
To build upon our continued innovation in time tracking, we’re excited to launch a new monthly calendar view for timesheets. This gives employees and managers a complete picture of recorded time over a month and provides the option to drill down into specific days, as well as submit or approve time for pay periods beyond a week. For managers, a new time approval center simplifies approval with a centralized dashboard where managers can monitor team working hours effectively and gain visibility into anomalies to help ensure accurate and timely payroll processing.

Timesheet approval center

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll: Joule, new localization, SAP Best Practices
We're excited to share that employees can now use Joule to access and review pay statements. Also, with the addition of Slovenia, we now offer 51 locales for our payroll solution – more than any other vendor in the market (see 2023 Gartner MQ for cloud HCM suites). In addition, we continue to use SAP Best Practices to deliver localized content, such as payroll onboarding forms for Canada. 

Access and review pay statements with Joule

Increase the strategic value and connection of HR

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking: New time sheet experience with SAP S/4HANA
With the launch of a new timesheet experience that integrates the latest version of My Timesheet in SAP S/4HANA with SAP SuccessFactors solutions, employees can now use a single timesheet to record time for payroll and against activities and/or cost objects. This helps organizations leverage real-time connectivity between HR and Finance operations to keep track of employee activity and labor costs while ensuring employees are paid accurately and on time.

New timesheet experience

SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone: Wizard layout tool, Engagement cards + quick actions  
With the new wizard layout tool, workspace admins can build multi-step processes that span multiple systems with the help of step-by-step instructions, such as an onboarding process for new hires. In addition, we're making it even easier to access SAP SuccessFactors content and complete HR tasks directly from a workspace, with engagement cards (birthdays, work anniversaries, bonus payouts, etc.) and new quick action cards for employees and managers.

Wizard layout tool

These are just a few of the many innovations in the SAP SuccessFactors First Half 2024 Release. Learn more with the resources below:

  • Check out Product Release & Roadmap Information on the SAP SuccessFactors Community (registration required) or HCM Innovations on sap.com to see additional release resources, including the release brochure, product videos, and solution specific blogs.
  • Watch the 1H 2024 release highlights video with Bianka Woelke, GVP, Head of Application Product Management

entry.title: S-IDの初期設定ができない
entry.content:
新規で作成したアカウント（SPHONE_NUMBER ）の初期設定メールを再送付してほしい。もしくは再設定の方法を教えてほしい。

 

以下のように試したが、パスワードの再設定ができなかった。

1.アカウントを作成した

2.SPHONE_NUMBER の初期設定案内メールが届いたが、有効期限が切れたため、設定できなかった。

3.ログイン画面でSPHONE_NUMBER を入力し、「パスワードを忘れた」からメールアドレスを入力し、再設定メールを申請した。

4.User　ID「SPHONE_NUMBER」のパスワード設定メールを受信した。（yodshibata@tohmatsu.co.jpに紐づいているアカウント）


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: S-IDの初期設定ができない
entry.content:
ご担当者様

平素よりお世話になっております。

本事象について、以下の手順によって、S-userのパスワードをリセットしてください。

  • Reset password of S-user :

Go to Forgot My Password

Tip: パスワードをリセットする場合、S-ユーザのIDを入力してください。

パスワードをリセットしてから、新規作成のS-userが登録できます。

宜しくお願い致します。

以上

高媛

SAP サポート

entry.title: Re: Select query date feild in not working
entry.content: Issue remains same 😞
